name: Maintenance Room
description: This room appears to have served as the maintenance hub for Flood Control Dam #3. The space shows signs of recent disturbance, though not panic—most of the valuable equipment has been selectively removed rather than destroyed. Mounted on the wall is a panel of colored buttons—blue, yellow, brown, and red—arranged without labels, as if familiarity was once assumed. Nearby are several tool chests, some open, some empty. A wrench, a screwdriver, and a small tube of indeterminate paste remain, left behind either by oversight or because they were no longer useful. Doorways lead west and south, back toward areas meant for visitors.
